text.title: OKR Cascade for Multi-Squad Product Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema draft-07 for the spec artefact this methodology produces, with valid and invalid examples plus forbidden patterns.

example.note: quarter pattern wrong; company_okrs empty; squad objective too short; krs<3; KR missing required keys; dep edge incomplete; cadence not in enum.

list.item: squad with fewer than 3 or more than 5 KRs.
dependency_edges entry missing any of {producer, consumer, deliverable, by_date}.
